name: 2048 Balls
author: Poki
description: 2048 Balls is a fun twist on the classic number-merging game with a bouncy ball twist! Drop and merge numbered balls strategically as they tumble and fuse into larger ones. Match identical numbers to climb higher and higher, but watch out—your measuring cup has limited space! The more you merge, the bigger the numbers and the higher your score. Can you hit the ultimate number before it all overflows? How to play 2048 Balls? Move the ball with your mouse, and left click to drop the ball! Who created 2048 Balls? 2048 Balls was created by Unico Studio.
